test_command: npm run build (TypeScript check + Vite build)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` and check for zero errors. No test suite exists.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Node v22, npm available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Components use framer-motion for animations, tailwindcss v4 with @theme for colors, Lucide icons, multi-language support via locales (en.json, id.json, zh.json) and LanguageContext. Dark theme uses [data-theme='dark'] CSS attribute with CSS variable overrides in index.css. Preferences are stored in PreferencesContext. Components use cursor-none and data-cursor attributes for custom cursor interactions.
directory_structure: src/ contains: App.tsx (main app with router), components/ (Navbar, CustomCursor, Section, menu/), sections/ (Hero, About, Projects, Skills, Contact, NotFound), contexts/ (Language, Preferences), locales/ (en, id, zh JSON), lib/ (deviceCapability, motion, storage), types/ (index.ts)
